name: Prowler
distinct: Large benchmark coverage with pragmatic cloud misconfiguration checks.

name: Wiz
distinct: Graph-based cloud attack path visibility across workloads and identities.

name: Prisma Cloud
distinct: Broad CNAPP suite spanning code, runtime, and cloud posture domains.

name: Checkov
distinct: Policy-as-code scanning for Terraform, Kubernetes, and CloudFormation.

name: tfsec
distinct: Fast local Terraform static analysis with clear remediation output.

name: Snyk IaC
distinct: Developer-first IaC checks tightly integrated into pull request flow.

name: TruffleHog
distinct: High-signal secret discovery with verified credential checks.

name: Gitleaks
distinct: Simple, fast, and CI-friendly scanner for leaked credentials.

name: Aqua Trivy
distinct: Single CLI for image, filesystem, and IaC vulnerability checks.

name: Falco
distinct: Runtime threat detection for containers and Kubernetes workloads.

name: Open Policy Agent
distinct: General-purpose policy engine used from CI to admission control.

name: Cloud Custodian
distinct: Policy-driven cloud resource governance and automated remediation.

name: Syft
distinct: Developer-friendly SBOM generator with broad package ecosystem support.

name: Grype
distinct: Vulnerability scanner designed to pair directly with generated SBOMs.

name: Permiso
distinct: Identity-centric detection focused on cloud service account abuse.

name: PMapper
distinct: Privilege escalation path analysis for AWS IAM role relationships.

name: Scout Suite
distinct: Multi-cloud security audit with visualized findings and drill-down.

name: Steampipe
distinct: Query cloud APIs with SQL for rapid compliance checks and dashboards.

name: CloudMapper
distinct: Visualizes AWS account relationships and attack paths for security review.

name: aws-nuke
distinct: Automates safe teardown of AWS resources to enforce clean account baselines.

name: Pacu
distinct: AWS exploitation framework for testing IAM abuse paths and cloud misconfigurations.

name: Security Monkey
distinct: Monitors cloud account changes and flags policy and configuration drift.

name: CloudGoat
distinct: Purpose-built AWS scenarios for validating detection and IAM attack-path readiness.

name: Cloudsplaining
distinct: Identifies risky IAM permissions and privilege-escalation patterns in AWS policies.

name: Terragoat
distinct: Deliberately vulnerable Terraform stack for testing IaC misconfiguration detection.

name: Parliament
distinct: Lints IAM policies to catch privilege, wildcard, and risky permission issues early.

name: CloudTracker
distinct: Compares CloudTrail activity to granted IAM permissions to spot over-privileged identities.

name: SkyArk
distinct: Finds and assesses highly privileged AWS entities that increase account takeover risk.
